docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-27-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-24-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF CARLOS COBTEC IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. DEFENDANT JESUS BRAVO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE COURT REVIEWED PLAINTIFF COBTEC'S EVIDENCE, MEDICAL RECORDS, LOSS OF UBER DRIVING ACTIVITY AND DEFENDANT BRAVO'S FARMER'S EXPLANATION DENYING LIABILITY FOR THE PLAINTIFF'S PHYSICAL INJURIES. THE COURT ORDERS $5000.00 IN MEDICAL BILLS AND PAIN AND SUFFERING TO PLAINTIFF COBTEC AND ORDERS DEFENDANT BRAVO TO CONTACT HIS INSURANCE COMPANY AND PRESENT THIS ORDER TO THEM TO TAKE RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE AWARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CARLOS COBTEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESUS BRAVO IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REQUESTED A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK, (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF CARLOS COBTEE IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JESUS BRAVO IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COBTEC, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, JESUS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COBTEC, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $110.00) SERVED JUN-19-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, JESUS
